# Arquivo de desbloqueio de segredos para GitHub Push Protection
# Use este arquivo para permitir o push de commits que contêm segredos

# URLs de desbloqueio para segredos expostos:
# 1. Google OAuth Client ID
https://github.com/arthurceratti/openclaw/security/secret-scanning/unblock-secret/3BDVHbxlqzsqa5Dkhos6UPlm94A

# 2. Google OAuth Access Token
https://github.com/arthurceratti/openclaw/security/secret-scanning/unblock-secret/3BDVHdLwkDdIeE2R2cMgDM0FzwB

# 3. Google OAuth Client Secret
https://github.com/arthurceratti/openclaw/security/secret-scanning/unblock-secret/3BDVHYvRLDZmnwF80FUpSzLuchf

# 4. Google OAuth Refresh Token
https://github.com/arthurceratti/openclaw/security/secret-scanning/unblock-secret/3BDVHWa90ZfjtOYGvLYHetMSII3

# Para permitir o push, visite cada URL e clique em "Allow push"
